title: Fix Rust RPL integration rank regression
description: The new RFC rank gate makes rust/lichen-rpl/tests/mesh_formation.rs advertise a backup parent at the same rank as the node, so the integration test fails when the preferred parent is removed. Update the test fixture to represent a valid lower-rank backup and verify the scenario remains meaningful.
close_reason: Updated parent_switch_on_link_failure backup to rank 512 with ETX 2.0, preserving the worse 1024 path cost while keeping the backup rank below the node. Verified integration tests pass.
